title: The Problem Solvers | Max Junestrand at Legora
summary: Legora is an AI-native operating system enabling legal teams to autonomously plan, execute, review, and complete complex legal work end-to-end. Built with Claude, it interprets law and addresses traditional legal work with AI integration.
